heading: Extension of enlistment: effect on pay and allowances
label: 906 Extension of enlistment: effect on pay and allowances
text: A member of the Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, Space Force, or Coast Guard, as the case may be, who extends his enlistment under is entitled to the same pay and allowances as though he had reenlisted. For the purposes of determining entitlement to reenlistment bonus or to travel and transportation allowances upon discharge, all such extensions of an enlistment are considered one continuous extension.section 509 of title 10

The words “same pay and allowances as though he had reenlisted” are substituted for the last 31 words of and the last 31 words of .section 3263(b) of title 10section 8263(b) of title 10
